creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
For purposes of the upgrade and on second thought of schedules, we would need:

- a rename of the existing backup as py-borgbackup11, adding the new one as py-borgbackup - unless we run late in this quarter of 2022 (but then we may just defer the commit until after the branch date just as well)
- possibly (to be discussed) a MOVED entry (for ports/MOVED) documenting the rename,
- an UPDATING entry describing how to stick with the 1.1.x version, or how to upgrade otherwise
